title: MCP Proxy Demo — Scrape & Export
description: Scrapes a website via Apify MCP Server through the MCP Proxy. Optionally exports the scraped markdown to a Notion page via a Notion MCP Server.

apifyMcpConnector.title: Apify MCP Connector
apifyMcpConnector.description: Connector to the Apify MCP Server (for running Actors and fetching datasets)

url.title: URL to crawl
url.description: The URL to scrape content from

notionMcpConnector.title: Notion MCP Connector (optional)
notionMcpConnector.description: Connector to a Notion MCP Server. If set together with Notion Page ID, scraped content will be exported to Notion.

notionPageId.title: Notion Page ID (optional)
notionPageId.description: The ID of the Notion page where scraped results will be appended as markdown blocks
